{{Quote|Oh, yuck.|Shannon Voorson, upon discovering the ''Exterminator''{{'s}} name|<ref name="Dragon" />}}
The '''''Exterminator''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] being manufactured in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. As the ''Exterminator''{{'s}} construction neared its finish, the amateur [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] [[Shannon Voorson]] managed to slice into an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] file listing a number of Star [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyers]] being built at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], including ''Exterminator''. Shannon later showed the Star Destroyer list to her cousin and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] member, [[Deen Voorson]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
